name: Cash Express Jewelry & Pawn
description_short: Cash Express Jewelry & Pawn is a pawn shop in Orlando, FL offering jewelry repair, watch repair, and collateral-based lending on valuables with same-day delivery options.
description_long:
Cash Express Jewelry & Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 6033 S Orange Blossom Trail in Orlando, Florida. The business is listed under multiple service categories including pawn shops, jewelry repair stores, electronics services, and watch repair stores, indicating a diversified approach to serving customers seeking both lending services and repair expertise.

The company offers a range of services typical to pawn operations: buying and selling used goods, jewelry repair, watch repair, and collateral-based lending. They accept credit card payments and provide same-day delivery options for customers, suggesting operational efficiency and customer convenience. The business maintains standard retail hours from 10:00 A.M. to 6:00 P.M. daily and can be reached at the provided phone number for inquiries.

According to the aggregated customer feedback presented on their profile, Cash Express distinguishes itself through staff professionalism and customer service attentiveness. Named staff members like Andrea and Flavia are specifically mentioned for going above and beyond to assist customers.

However, the profile contains limited verified information, as the owner has not completed the verification process on the listing platform. While customer summaries praise fair pricing, reliability, and service quality, actual verified reviews are absent from the profile. Prospective customers should contact the business directly to verify current services, pricing, and lending terms, as pawn shop regulations and offerings vary significantly by location and individual business practices.
address: 6033 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32809

pros: Same-day delivery service available for purchases
Staff members specifically praised for exceptional helpfulness and going above and beyond customer expectations
Prompt responses to online inquiries and efficient in-store assistance noted by customers
Competitive and fair pricing compared to other pawn shops
Multiple service offerings including jewelry repair, watch repair, and electronics services in one location
Accepts credit card payments for convenience
Courteous support for addressing online ordering issues
cons: Owner has not completed business verification process on the listing platform, limiting credibility
No actual verified customer reviews currently displayed despite aggregated review summaries
No transparent information about lending terms, interest rates, or collateral requirements
Limited safety and insurance information disclosed regarding customer valuables
best_for: Individuals seeking to pawn jewelry, watches, or electronics for quick cash loans
Customers needing jewelry or watch repair services in the Orlando area
People looking to buy used goods at competitive prices from a local pawn shop
diagnosis: Cash Express Jewelry & Pawn is best suited for Orlando-area residents needing quick collateral-based loans on jewelry, watches, or electronics, or those seeking repair services and used goods. The main caveat is the lack of verified business credentials and actual customer reviews, combined with minimal disclosure of lending terms, making it essential to contact them directly about rates, loan duration, and interest before committing.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry and valuables
meta_description: Cash Express Jewelry & Pawn in Orlando offers jewelry repair, watch repair, and collateral lending on valuables.
